text.title: AWS EC2 + ECS Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable signals to a rule from 01-core-rules.xml. Use when in doubt about which variant to apply.

decision-tree.root-question: Do all Applies-If preconditions hold and no Skip-If trigger fires?

conclusion.verdict: do not run this methodology; document skip rationale

branch.question: Is there a named human owner (not team/channel)?

conclusion.verdict: defer until ownership resolved; anonymous artefact rots

branch.question: Is the trigger named (event / threshold / schedule)?

conclusion.verdict: rewrite trigger to a concrete event/threshold/cron before proceeding

branch.question: Are evidence anchors present for every conclusion?

conclusion.verdict: block at review; require evidence link or explicit not_applicable rationale
run the methodology; commit the artefact per output contract

text.example: preconditions=true → named_owner=true → trigger_named=true → evidence_present=true → conclusion ref=graviton-tasks.
